rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RICHARD DIAMOND 2016 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: P0etition To Determine Title To Property
rulings.Rulings: continued to january 30, 2017. no file stamped hard copy of the petition and no proposed order delivered to this examiner in Room 202 (hard copies required. Faxed or emailed copies are NOT accepted). a quick review of the petition, however, shows the Trustor likely had heirs other than the son named in the petition. there are specific notice requirements for heirs who are not trust beneficiaries (see Probate Code section 851). a supplement to the petition must be filed identifying all of the Trustor's heirs and proof of service must be filed no later than january 18, 2017.
